/* NOTE: This is the global export file for rxjs v6 and higher. */ /* rxjs */ export * from '../index'; /* rxjs.operators */ import * as _operators from '../operators/index'; export const operators = _operators; /* rxjs.testing */ import * as _testing from '../testing/index'; export const testing = _testing; /* rxjs.ajax */ import * as _ajax from '../ajax/index'; export const ajax = _ajax; /* rxjs.webSocket */ import * as _webSocket from '../webSocket/index'; export const webSocket = _webSocket; /* rxjs.fetch */ import * as _fetch from '../fetch/index'; export const fetch = _fetch;
